title: 98 Portland Place
notes:
LTHW System Remedial Dosing via fitted dosing pots

To dose the LTHW system with corrosion inhibitor, biocide and pH buffered solution.

1 x WTP SNITE25 - 1.2 litres to be dosed into LTHW system.


1 x WTP C745 - 1 litre to be dosed into LTHW system.

1 x pH Reducer Buffer 5.1 - Up to 10 litres to be dosed into LTHW system as required.



VISIT 1 - BIOCIDE & pH BUFFERED SOLUTION DOSING
Check pH initially, and if still high and then dose 1 litre of pH buffered solution, and allow to circulate for approx. 7 days. 

VISIT 2 - VISIT 2 - INHIBITOR & pH MONITORING VISIT
Check pH initially, if within range of 7.0-8.0, do not dose pH buffered solution. However if not within range, dose 1 litre of pH buffered solution and allow to circulate for approx. 7 days.


VISIT 3 - VISIT 3 - pH MONITORING VISIT AND POST DOSE SAMPLING
Check pH initially. if within range of 7.0-8.0, do not dose pH buffered solution. However if not within range, dose 1 litre of pH buffered solution and allow to circulate for approx. 7 days.

1 X Chem post dose - (Suite =CHEM POST DOSE, 1L Sample required) from LTHW system

1 x mciro  -  (Suite = BSRIA BACTI).  from LTHW system

title: Macaulay Walk - Blocks C & K
notes:
WTP M27:
78 litres to be dosed into Block C LTHW system.
110 litres to be dosed into Block K LTHW system.

4 litres of WTP SNITE to be dosed into Block C LTHW system.

7 litres of WTP C745 to be dosed into Block K LTHW system.

**AS SYSTEM VOLUMES HAVE BEEN ESTIMATED, PLEASE ENSURE THAT THE ATTENDING ENGINEER CARRIES OUT THE DOSING ON A GRADUAL BASIS AND CARRIES OUT REGULAR ONSITE TESTING TO ENSURE THAT THE SYSTEMS ARE NOT OVERDOSED.**

Dosing to be carried out over 3 x visits:

FITTED DOSING POT

VISIT 1 - BIOCIDE DOSING:

1 x WTP C745 - Broad Spectrum Triazine based biocide for treatment of closed systems targeting Pseudomonas and SRB. Supplied in
10 litre containers. 
7 litres to be dosed into Block K LTHW system.



VISIT 2 - INHIBITOR DOSING: 

1 x WTP SNITE25 - Nitrite corrosion inhibitor for boosting nitrite levels where depletion is noted by NRB/other causes for nitrite or
Molybdate/nitrite blended products. Supplied in 10 litre containers. 
- 4 litres to be dosed into Block C LTHW system.

19 x M27 - Multi Functional Closed System Corrosion and Scale Treatment - 1% of the system volume to give 300 ppm nitrite (as
NaNO2) and 300 ppm molybdate (as MoO4). Non aggressive to Aluminium. Aids Cleaning. Supplied in 10L container.

78 litres to be dosed into Block C LTHW system.
110 litres to be dosed into Block K LTHW system.#

To return empty chemical drums to Hydrocert unit for environmental disposal

VISIT 3 - POST DOSE SAMPLING:
2 x (Suite =CHEM POST DOSE, 1L Sample required) from Block C and Block K LTHWs
1 x (Suite = BSRIA BACTI) from Block K LTHW
